reviews.review_description: I'm on a 512GB Quest 3 and it's lagging like if I were on Quest Link. The screen tearing and delayed laggy view just don't look good. The game is like Fall Guys but I don't really have to do anything. I just have to flick my wrist a few times and I'll be extremely fast. Takes literally no effort to play. And of course I can't forget the cherry on top, the game is full of little kids screaming into your ears the second you join. Waste of my time and storage. Don't play this.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your feedback. WeέΑβre sorry to hear you experienced the lag issue. Our team is continuously working on performance improvements and bug fixes. If possible, please reach out to our support team with more details so we can investigate further. We appreciate you giving Skyland a try.

reviews.review_description: I've been having fun playing the beta with friends. Love the kawaii Sanrio character-themed cosmetics! Controls feel pretty smooth, and the racing mini game is a fun challenge. I'd like to see an option for party formation or friends-only voice chat because the public voice channel felt a little overwhelming when I played the early access.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing this! WeέΑβre so glad youέΑβve been enjoying playing with friends and exploring the outfits and mini-games. We also appreciate the feedback around voice chatέΑΦcomfort and social experience are important, and notes like this are really helpful as Skyland continues to grow. Thanks for being part of early access and taking the time to share your thoughts.

reviews.review_description:
I really enjoy playing hello Kitty Skyland! It was really fun to get to interact and engage with people in the platform, though I can find the game a little overwhelming with the open voice chat sometimes catching conversations from afar, the arm movement controls as a pluffee, and some of the final aspects does cause motion sickness for me. 

I am looking forward to getting to play again soon, because it would be really fun to play with friends who werenέΑβt involved in the beta testing.

Disclosure: I had received credits for the project as one of the beta testers and helping promote the project!

developer_response.body: Thank you for being a beta tester and for your thoughtful feedback. WeέΑβre glad you enjoyed interacting with others in Skyland, and we appreciate your comments έΑΦ they help us continue improving the experience.

reviews.review_description: I was one of the early beta testers and just got back on the game for the first time since launch. Runs smooth characters are easy to control. I think this is a great game for kids, as an adult it doesnt really hold my interest for very long but definitely a casual game that I won't mind jumping into every now and then. It will be interesting to see how much better it gets as the game is developed. It may cause motion sickness in some individuals though I will warn on that. It's a little disorienting jumping through the sky but it's pretty fun

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share such thoughtful feedbackέΑΦespecially as an early beta tester. WeέΑβre glad to hear the experience feels smooth and approachable, and we appreciate you letting us know both what worked well and areas to be mindful of. Skyland is continuing to evolve, and insights like yours are important as we refine comfort, activities, and long-term play. Thanks again for checking back in and sharing your experience.
Thank you for the kind review. WeέΑβre glad youέΑβre enjoying a Hello Kitty world in VR.
